ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projector_screens" (
  "item_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each projector screen */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the projector screen */,
  "viewable_diagonal" INTEGER /* Viewable diagonal size in inches */,
  "viewable_height" INTEGER /* Viewable height in inches */,
  "viewable_width" INTEGER /* Viewable width in inches */,
  "projection_surface" TEXT /* Type of projection surface */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the projector screen */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the projector screen (e.g., HDTV [16:9]) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the projector screen */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the projector screen image */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the projector screen */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the projector screen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projector_screens_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projector_screens_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Electric, Manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category includes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Epson, Elite Screens) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the stock is held */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the projector screen */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the projector screen */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the projector screen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the retail location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the projector screen at the change date */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "projection_surface" TEXT /* Projection surface of the variant */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specifications_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Reference to the projector screen item number */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_number FOREIGN KEY ("item_number") REFERENCES projector_screens ("item_number")
)
